recommendations.title: Five Nights at Freddy's
recommendations.overview: Recently fired and desperate for work, a troubled young man named Mike agrees to take a position as a night security guard at an abandoned theme restaurant: Freddy Fazbear's Pizzeria. But he soon discovers that nothing at Freddy's is what it seems.

recommendations.title: One Way
recommendations.overview: On the run with a bag full of cash after a robbing his former crime boss—and a potentially fatal wound—Freddy slips onto a bus headed into a rainy night in Georgia. With his life slipping through his fingers, Freddy is left with very few choices to s

recommendations.title: Cop Land
recommendations.overview: Freddy Heflin is the sheriff of a place everyone calls “Cop Land” — a small and seemingly peaceful town populated by the big city police officers he’s long admired. Yet something ugly is taking place behind the town’s peaceful facade. And when Freddy

recommendations.title: Freddy Got Fingered
recommendations.overview: Unemployed cartoonist Gord Brody moves back in with his parents Jim and Julie and younger brother Freddy. When his parents demand he leave, he retaliates by spreading rumors that Jim is sexually abusing Freddy.

recommendations.title: 100% Wolf
recommendations.overview: Freddy Lupin, heir to a proud family line of werewolves, is in for a shock when on his 14th birthday his first 'warfing' goes awry, turning him into a ferocious poodle.  The pack elders give Freddy until the next moonrise to prove he has the heart of

recommendations.title: Never Sleep Again: The Elm Street Legacy
recommendations.overview: For decades, Freddy Krueger has slashed his way through the dreams of countless youngsters, scaring up over half a billion dollars at the box office across eight terrifying, spectacular films.

recommendations.title: Death Whisperer
recommendations.overview: When a remote village is plagued by a deadly curse, one brother must fight to save his family from a terrifying supernatural threat.

recommendations.title: Haunting of the Queen Mary
recommendations.overview: When photographers Erin and Patrick are brought aboard the ship with their young son Lukas, they unleash a series of events that entwines their family with the ship’s dark past. As the terror unfolds around them they begin to realise there is more to

recommendations.title: A Nightmare on Elm Street 4: The Dream Master
recommendations.overview: Freddy Krueger returns once again to terrorize the dreams of the remaining Dream Warriors, as well as those of a young woman who may be able to defeat him for good.

recommendations.title: Wes Craven's New Nightmare
recommendations.overview: A demonic force has chosen Freddy Krueger as its portal to the real world. Can Heather Langenkamp play the part of Nancy one last time and trap the evil trying to enter our world?
